overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a science fiction video game showing a character with short dark hair exploring a dimly lit industrial office interior. The character walks through a utilitarian workspace with metal walls, fluorescent lighting, and office furniture, then proceeds through a doorway into an adjacent room.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial office workspace with control desk

agents.ego_description: walking through the industrial office space toward the desk area

notable_agents.action: seated at desk working on computer terminal

entered.detail: metal rack with hanging garments and equipment
tall industrial storage lockers against the wall
large metal desk with computer monitor and scattered papers
office chair positioned in front of the desk
wall-mounted whiteboard with writing and diagrams
fluorescent overhead light panels illuminating the room
exposed conduit and piping running along the ceiling

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a dimly lit industrial office space with metal walls and fluorescent lighting. A coat rack and metal lockers stand against the left wall while a desk with a seated NPC occupies the center area. The camera follows from behind as the character approaches the workspace.

scene_state.functional_zone: corridor leading to adjacent laboratory space

events.description: character approaches and enters the doorway connecting to the next room

agents.ego_description: walking past the desk area and entering the doorway to the adjacent room

entered.detail: metal door frame with rounded corners leading to the next room
tall metal shelving units stocked with boxes and equipment
large circular industrial fan housing mounted on the wall
second room visible through doorway containing additional workstations

segments.scene_description: Moving past the desk area, the character approaches a doorway framed by metal shelving and ventilation equipment on the right. The camera follows as the character walks through the threshold into an adjacent room, leaving the initial office space behind.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dimly lit industrial office that transitions into an adjacent interior room. It begins by following the character from behind as they navigate a utilitarian workspace characterized by metal walls, fluorescent lighting, and a coat rack beside metal lockers. As the character moves deeper into the space, the camera glides past a central desk occupied by a seated NPC. The scene then shifts toward a doorway framed by metal shelving and ventilation equipment on the right. Finally, the camera follows the character through the threshold, leaving the initial office behind to enter the next room.
